name: Jdtls Lsp
description: Java language server (Eclipse JDT.LS) for Claude Code, providing code intelligence and refactoring.
longDescription: Wires the Eclipse JDT.LS Java language server into Claude Code for `.java` files, giving real code intelligence (go-to-definition, references, diagnostics) and refactoring instead of plain-text edits. Requires Java 17+ and a `jdtls` binary on PATH — install via `brew install jdtls` on macOS or your distro's package manager on Linux.
